name: APIs.guru
description: APIs.guru — Community-maintained directory of 2000+ public OpenAPI specifications indexed for discovery and tooling.

seo.title: APIs.guru — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: APIs.guru: APIs.guru — Community-maintained directory of 2000+ public OpenAPI specifications indexed for discovery and tooling.

when_to_use: Discover OpenAPI specs for 2000+ public APIs
API compatibility checks against published OpenAPI
Toolchain integration pulling latest spec for validation
Open-source catalog for API aggregator applications

pros: Great for SDK generators and tooling
review.verdict: An indispensable free resource for anyone building API tools, even with some stale entries.
review.best_for: Tool builders, SDK generators, and researchers needing bulk OpenAPI specs
review.not_for: Teams needing authoritative, always-current specs direct from vendors
